inscriptions.head:
BITrewards whitepaper V4: 
A Unified Incentive Framework for Open-Source, DeSci, Investor & Skill Contributions (16) based on Bitcoin Ordinals (NFTs)







Abstract
BITrewards is an independent, cross-chain and cross-industry incentive framework that tokenizes contributions—from software code and scientific discoveries to skill-based videos and community moderation—as NFTs on Bitcoin ordinals. It enables gas fee sharing for immediate rewards and AI-traced royalties for long-term value, fostering sustai
